## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and reporting adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Discern showing resilience amid industry-wide SEO volatility: impressions down, clicks up 4% week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to include more competitor comparisons to improve LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Agreed to move from weekly to monthly performance reporting, with ad-hoc updates for significant changes](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Amid Industry Volatility

  - [Industry experiencing wild drops in clicks (e.g., Business Insider reported 55% drop)](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Discern showing opposite trend: impression drops but click increases week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [October forecasted to outperform September despite volatility](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Theories on Discern's resilience: highly targeted content, competitors being hit harder](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)
  - [Blog performance: double-digit session growth, improved engagement across the board](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Focusing on nexus content cluster and link fixes (404s, dead links)](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Adding \~30 new assignments for competitor comparisons (e.g., "CT Corp alternatives")](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Goal: Improve LLM referral traffic by targeting competitive keywords](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Top referral sources: foreign qualification registration (50%), state-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### LLM Performance

  - [Slight increase in ChatGPT mentions, decrease in Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Overall responses generated up slightly, competitive presence stable](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [Leading competitors for LLM citations: Harvard Business Services, CT Corporation](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [New focus on creating content comparing Discern to competitors (e.g., "Discern vs X")](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Megan noticed ads for competitor "Delve" in San Francisco (possibly SOC 2 related)](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Team to draft initial competitor comparison content for Mike's review](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### Reporting Cadence

  - [Agreed to shift from weekly to monthly performance reporting](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Weekly meetings to focus on standout items, ongoing work, and any flags/issues](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Mike prefers focus on longer-term trends and significant changes rather than small week-to-week fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to prioritize and begin work on new competitor comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Megan to draft initial competitor comparison pieces for Mike's review](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Team to implement monthly performance reporting structure](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)
  - [Continue monitoring industry-wide SEO volatility and Discern's relative performance](https://fathom.video/share/wysKERYYsxc5x2jsouWrb9LoFUX7ndNW?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
